caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black sweatshirt with "BOSS" written in gold letters, and large headphones sits in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a white backdrop featuring repeated logos that read "HUSTLE" beneath five gold stars. Above him, a sign reads "'Where BOSSES Talk!'". The man is speaking into a professional microphone attached to a black boom arm. On the desk in front of him is a black mug with red and white text that includes "TALK OUT". In the bottom left corner of each scene, a small logo includes the word "TALK". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, shifting his head slightly as he speaks, while the background and equipment remain static.
